walkthrough.title: Start by introducing yourself
walkthrough.summary: Tell OnboardAI your role, level, and tech stack so it can select the right onboarding path.
steps: Say who you are joining as, for example: Backend Intern, Frontend Engineer, or DevOps.
Mention your main tech stack, for example: Node.js, React, Python, or Kubernetes.
After that, the workspace will switch from waiting mode to your first guided task.
walkthrough.completionHint: Example: Hi, I'm Riya. I've joined as a Backend Intern working on Node.js.
walkthrough.whyItMatters: Without your role and stack, the app cannot pick the correct checklist or starter ticket.
quickReplies: Hi, I'm Riya. I've joined as a Backend Intern working on Node.js.
